case_title: SCOTT ERICKSON VS. CRIS L LLORENTE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ERICKSON, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LLORENTE, CRIS L THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 260 KING ST. 	61, S.F. CA. 94107, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ERICKSON, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LLORENTE, CRIS L THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 2/7/07, $4,700.00 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $4,229.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,429.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
